zh.Thorpe Market, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可索普 馬可特
zh.Walcot, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可瓦爾可特
zh.Walcote, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾瓦爾可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Millicent de Gunton於1310年出生在英國諾福爾可索普 馬可特時，她的父親Walter de Gunton36歲，母親Adelicia de Gunton21歲。她於大約1332年與Walter de Walcott在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年在她的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.Thorpe Market, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可索普 馬可特
zh-hans.Walcot, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可瓦爾可特
zh-hans.Walcote, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾瓦爾可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Millicent de Gunton于1310年出生在英国諾福爾可索普 馬可特时，她的父亲Walter de Gunton36岁，母亲Adelicia de Gunton21岁。她于大约1332年与Walter de Walcott在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年在她的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): habitational name from either of two places in East Anglia, one in Norfolk and the other in Suffolk, both named with the Old Norse personal name Gunni (see Gunn 1) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Gunn
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Old Norse personal name Gunnr (based on a word meaning ‘battle’), or perhaps from Gunne, a pet form of the Old Norse female personal name Gunnhildr (see Gunnell ).
History: This is the name of a Scottish clan or family associated principally with Caithness and Sutherland. It claims descent from a certain Gunni or Guinn who lived in the 12th century.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Millicent de Gunton was born in 1310, in Thorpe Market, Norfolk, England, her father, Walter de Gunton, was 36 and her mother, Adelicia de Gunton, was 21. She married Walter de Walcott about 1332, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1352, in her hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Millicent de Gunton est née en 1310, à Thorpe Market, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Gunton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adelicia de Gunton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Walcott environ 1332, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1352, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Millicent de Gunton 1310 in Thorpe Market, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Gunton 36 und ihre Mutter Adelicia de Gunton 21. Sie hat um 1332 in England Walter de Walcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1352 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent de Gunton è nata il nel 1310 nel Thorpe Market, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Walter de Gunton, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Adelicia de Gunton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Walcott circa 1332, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1352, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルク
ja.Walcot, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクワルコト

ja.lifeSummary: Millicent de Guntonが1310年にイギリスノーフォルクソルペ マーケトで生まれた時，父Walter de Guntonは36歳，母Adelicia de Guntonは21歳であった。約1332年にイギリスでWalter de Walcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Millicent de Gunton(이)가 1310년 영국 노르폴크 소 마크트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Gunton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelicia de Gunton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1332년 영국에서 Walter de Walcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent de Gunton nasceu em 1310, em Thorpe Market, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Gunton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adelicia de Gunton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Walcott aproximadamente 1332, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1352, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Millicent de Gunton родилась в 1310 г. в местности таурп маркет, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter de Gunton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelicia de Gunton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Walcott около 1332 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1352 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Millicent de Gunton nació en 1310, en Thorpe Market, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Gunton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adelicia de Gunton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Walter de Walcott aproximadamente 1332, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1352, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
